title: Civic Briefing — Week of July 6, 2026: Sports Fees, Road Money, and Oakdale Moves Out
summary: Middle-school sports fees rise to about $200 a sport in Stillwater's district 834; Washington County lines up roughly $4 million in road-project decisions July 7 with public comment open; and Oakdale's City Hall and police lobby relocate for a year-and-a-half rebuild funded by a voter-approved sales tax. Plus a class-size change, two county comment windows closing this week, and where to show up. Hosted by Artie Fishel.
